comment: The most useful feature of this app is now gone. We can no longer turn our device in landscape to show text in fullscreen. That was incredibly useful when traveling and communicating with locals. Now we can't do this anymore. This app is just another basic dictionary now.
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
